title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 393.837 - Securities law of Missouri not to apply, when
text:
393.837.  Securities law of Missouri not to apply, when. — The provisions of the securities law of Missouri shall not apply to any note, bond or other evidence of indebtedness issued by any nonprofit sewer company transacting business in this state pursuant to sections 393.825 to 393.861 and section 393.175 to the United States of America or to any agency or instrumentality thereof, or to any mortgage or deed of trust executed to secure the same.  The provisions of such securities law of Missouri shall not apply to the issuance of membership certificates by any nonprofit sewer company.
(L. 1997 2d Ex. Sess. H.B. 1 merged with S.B. 3) 
Effective 12-23-97
